center.name: Cameroonian Highlands forests
center.summary: Cameroonian Highlands forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Green-breasted bushshrike、Yellow-breasted boubou、Mountain sooty boubou等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green longtail (Urolais epichlorus) is a bird species of the family Cisticolidae, in the monotypic genus Urolais. It is native to the Western High Plateau and the Cameroonian Highlands forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Cameroon line from Bioko, Equatorial Guinea north to Mount Oku, Cameroon and the Obudu Plateau, Nigeria. In the Cameroon highlands, it is found in montane forests, usually above 600 m in elevation.
